title: Hub Workflow Manifest
description: Per-entry manifest for a HubWorkflow — points at a tar.gz bundle containing workflow.yaml + optional prompts/ + optional scripts/ + optional tests/. workflow.yaml validated against workflow-definition.schema.json at install + at the test endpoint.

description.description: Human-readable summary for index display. The authoritative definition lives in the bundle's workflow.yaml.

dependencies.description: Informational cross-entry references (models / mcp-servers this workflow expects).

license.description: SPDX license identifier. Required for hub publish.
